# Minicuration

Minicuration produces museum-quality reproductions of original paintings on 2.5×3.5-inch trading cards (ACEO format), limited to exactly 50 numbered editions per design and sealed in a rigid magnetic acrylic display case with a standing easel included. Every print reproduces a hand-painted original in acrylic, mixed media, and found materials (such as spray paint, ink, joint compound, latex, and epoxy resin) on canvas or wood panel. All work is currently by a single artist, JFeelgood (https://jfeelgood.com). The back of each card carries the artist name, medium, edition number, and the artist's own statement about the work. All prints are $23 USD.

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://minicuration.com/
- Shop (all 6 designs): https://minicuration.com/shop.html
- About: https://minicuration.com/about.html
- Artist — JFeelgood: https://minicuration.com/artists/jfeelgood.html

## Products (all by JFeelgood, $23, limited to 50 editions each)

- Dreamfall: https://minicuration.com/shop/dreamfall.html
- Dream Mountain: https://minicuration.com/shop/dream-mountain.html
- Sky Miles: https://minicuration.com/shop/sky-miles.html
- A Simple Meditation: https://minicuration.com/shop/a-simple-meditation.html
- Veritas: https://minicuration.com/shop/veritas.html
- Sweet Dreams: https://minicuration.com/shop/sweet-dreams.html

## What makes Minicuration distinct

- Trading card size (2.5×3.5 inches) — sealed in a rigid magnetic acrylic case that stands on the included easel (the case is a protective display object, not a wallet insert)
- Strictly 50 numbered prints per design; no reprints
- Each card ships sealed in a magnetic acrylic collector's case with a display stand
- Reproduces original paintings, not digital art — every print has a physical source work
- Artist statement on the back of every card
- Connects collectors directly to the artist via affordable, physical collectibles
- Sister site: https://jfeelgood.com
